mechanism_narrative: A low federal funds rate reduces the risk-free discount rate applied to future corporate cash flows, increasing equity present values and generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 20-day forward returns are negative in more than 50% of months when FEDFUNDS is held below 2.0% during any 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid rise in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating household income and falling corporate revenue expectations, causing risk-averse investors to reduce equity exposure and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 20-day forward returns are positive in more than 55% of instances when UNRATE rises more than 0.3 percentage points over a trailing 3-month window.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in retail sales and a decline in the unemployment rate indicate demand-pull economic expansion without cost pressure spikes, driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: The joint z-score combination of RSAFS and UNRATE fails to achieve a Rank IC above 0.04 over any 5-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month increases in industrial production generate positive S&P 500 returns over 5 trading days exclusively in high-unemployment regimes, as capacity utilization gains are fully priced in when labor markets are tight.
failure_condition: When UNRATE exceeds 5.5%, positive month-over-month INDPRO changes do not produce positive 5-day S&P 500 returns in at least 55% of observations over a 3-year rolling window.

mechanism_narrative: Consumer price inflation accelerating above 3% annualized over a 3-month window forces the Federal Reserve to hold or raise the federal funds rate, increasing real discount rates and producing negative S&P 500 returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 60-day forward returns are not negative in more than 50% of triggered instances when CPIAUCSL 3-month annualized change exceeds 3.0%.

mechanism_narrative: A joint signal of rising nonfarm payrolls and a falling unemployment rate indicates a tightening labor market that boosts wage income and consumption, generating positive S&P 500 returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: The interaction term of PAYEMS and UNRATE produces a Rank IC below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or positive 5-day returns occur in fewer than 55% of joint-signal months.

mechanism_narrative: Housing starts exceeding 1,000 thousand units signals durable residential investment momentum that propagates through construction and mortgage credit channels, producing positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: S&P 500 20-day forward returns are negative in more than 50% of triggered months when HOUST exceeds 1,000 thousand units.

mechanism_narrative: Month-over-month growth in industrial production reflects rising manufacturing output and corporate revenue acceleration, directly driving positive S&P 500 returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Positive month-over-month changes in INDPRO coincide with positive S&P 500 20-day forward returns in fewer than 55% of observations over any 3-year rolling window.
